highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 2.88.0 adds .NET 6, .NET MAUI, Mac Catalyst, WinUI and Blazor WebAssembly support.
highlights_body: This is the first stable release built for the .NET 6 era. It ships new views for .NET MAUI (both compat and handlers), first-class Mac Catalyst binaries, an ASP.NET Blazor WebAssembly component, and refreshes HarfBuzz to 2.8.2. Native lifecycle and packaging were reworked to fit the new TFMs.

breaking.title: iOS and tvOS ToUIImage overloads that used nfloat were removed
breaking.body: The `nfloat` overloads of `ToUIImage` on `SKBitmap`, `SKPixmap` and `SKPicture` in `SkiaSharp.Views.iOS` and `SkiaSharp.Views.tvOS` were removed as part of the .NET 6 unification. Pass the scale as `float` and the orientation on the remaining overloads instead.

breaking.title: GRContext now derives from GRRecordingContext
breaking.body: `GRContext` was reparented from `SKObject` onto the new `GRRecordingContext` base type to match upstream Skia. Existing code that uses `GRContext` continues to work; code that reflected on the base type or cast to `SKObject` needs to update.

bullets.detail: The binding, views and HarfBuzz projects gained `net6.0-*` TFMs, and shipping .NET MAUI views (both the compat layer and the new handlers) are included.

bullets.lead: Mac Catalyst is a first-class target
bullets.detail: Mac Catalyst native binaries are built and packaged, with the frameworks reorganised through the gn files.

bullets.lead: WinUI, Windows App SDK and Xamarin.Forms on .NET Core 3.1
bullets.detail: The Windows story was refreshed to target the Windows App SDK, and Xamarin.Forms views now light up on `netcoreapp3.1`.
A new `SKCanvasView` component targets ASP.NET Blazor WebAssembly, with an infinite-loop guard on invalidation.
The bundled HarfBuzz shaping engine is updated to 2.8.2.

bullets.lead: New APIs added across the surface
bullets.detail: A batch of new APIs from upstream Skia is now exposed on the managed surface.
The `IgnorePixelScaling` property on the canvas views produces the intended coordinate space instead of double-scaling.
The .NET MAUI `SKCanvasView` no longer throws a `NullReferenceException` in certain lifecycle paths.

bullets.lead: Windows handle lookup is faster and safer
bullets.detail: The internal `HandleDictionary` lock was replaced with a critical section on Windows to reduce contention under load.

bullets.lead: iOS views paint an opaque background
bullets.detail: The iOS view now has a background set, so first-frame content is not lost on some devices.

bullets.lead: Static native objects are no longer disposed
bullets.detail: Statically-cached native handles skip disposal, avoiding double-free on shutdown.
A workaround was added for enums not being treated as blittable in some scenarios, keeping interop stable.
The native build moved to Python 3, Clang 12 and a newer gcc/llvm pair for reproducible modern builds.

contributor_summaries.jeromelaban: Bumped Uno to 4.0 so the Uno-hosted views keep pace with the SDK
contributor_summaries.jonathanpeppers: Android packaging fixes — kept `.so` files out of class libraries and trimmed generated `Resource.designer.cs` fields
contributor_summaries.akoeplinger: Made the Linux native loader try `libdl.so.2` before `libdl.so` so newer distributions resolve
contributor_summaries.JensKrumsieck: Fixed an infinite invalidation loop in the Blazor `SKCanvasView`
contributor_summaries.jsuarezruiz: Guarded against a `NullReferenceException` in the .NET MAUI `SKCanvasView`
contributor_summaries.mjbond-msft: Contributed to the .NET 6 / MAUI enablement work landing in this release
contributor_summaries.toptensoftware: Replaced the Windows `HandleDictionary` lock with a critical section to cut contention

preview_summaries.2.88.0-p266: Preview 266 finished the .NET MAUI RC 3 line-up and picked up the last packaging fixes before stable.
preview_summaries.2.88.0-p254: Preview 254 moved to .NET MAUI RC 1 and switched CI to macOS Monterey.
preview_summaries.2.88.0-p232: Preview 232 refreshed native tooling to Python 3 and Clang 12, and picked up more upstream Skia fixes.
preview_summaries.2.88.0-p209: Preview 209 rolled up Skia and interop fixes, and refreshed the Mac Catalyst build inputs.
preview_summaries.2.88.0-p187: Preview 187 moved to .NET MAUI Preview 12 and tightened Android packaging.
preview_summaries.2.88.0-p178: Preview 178 moved to .NET MAUI Preview 11 and added the Blazor SKCanvasView infinite-loop guard, the Windows lock rework and the enum-blittability workaround.
preview_summaries.2.88.0-p152: Preview 152 refreshed a batch of dependencies and picked up new APIs.
preview_summaries.2.88.0-p150: Preview 150 added the ASP.NET Blazor WebAssembly SKCanvasView component.
preview_summaries.2.88.0-p145: Preview 145 tuned Android packaging and moved to .NET MAUI Preview 7.
preview_summaries.2.88.0-p139: Preview 139 fixed IgnorePixelScaling, added main PDBs to the packages and moved to Windows App SDK.
preview_summaries.2.88.0-p127: Preview 127 updated HarfBuzz to 2.8.2 and added Xamarin.Forms support on netcoreapp3.1.
preview_summaries.2.88.0-p120: Preview 120 moved to .NET 6, guarded the .NET MAUI SKCanvasView and set the iOS view background.
preview_summaries.2.88.0-p61: Preview 61 opened the 2.88 line with .NET 6 TFMs, Mac Catalyst binaries and the first .NET MAUI views.

harfbuzz_summary: HarfBuzzSharp 2.8.2 refreshes the bundled HarfBuzz shaping engine, adds Mac Catalyst binaries and gains `net6.0-*` TFMs alongside its SkiaSharp counterpart.
